attributes.title: [Cassandra OTel] Overview
attributes.description: Overview of Apache Cassandra cluster health from OTel JMX metrics: client request latency, throughput, errors, compaction, and storage.
attributes.panelsJSON:
[{"panelIndex": "91144e9b-fac7-b44d-0b1d-8339201b83cb", "gridData": {"x": 0, "y": 0, "w": 48, "h": 2, "i": "91144e9b-fac7-b44d-0b1d-8339201b83cb"}, "type": "links", "embeddableConfig": {"enhancements": {}, "attributes": {"layout": "horizontal", "links": [{"id": "3af4ba12-6f83-488a-bdc9-0c7216a22d73", "order": 0, "label": "Overview", "type": "dashboardLink", "destinationRefName": "link_3af4ba12-6f83-488a-bdc9-0c7216a22d73_dashboard"}]}}}, {"panelIndex": "0563dba8-e018-01bf-7e3c-91932750954e", "gridData": {"x": 0, "y": 2, "w": 16, "h": 12, "i": "0563dba8-e018-01bf-7e3c-91932750954e"}, "type": "visualization", "embeddableConfig": {"enhancements": {"dynamicActions": {"events": []}}, "hidePanelTitles": true, "savedVis": {"type": "markdown", "id": "", "title": "", "description": "", "params": {"fontSize": 12, "openLinksInNewTab": false, "markdown": "## [Cassandra OTel] Overview

This dashboard monitors Apache Cassandra cluster health from JMX metrics:
- Client request latency (p50, p99) by operation and node
- Request throughput and error rates by operation and status
- Compaction health (pending vs completed tasks)
- Storage load and hints per node
"}, "uiState": {}, "data": {"aggs": [], "searchSource": {"query": {"query": "", "language": "kuery"}, "filter": []}}}}}, {"panelIndex": "1a283266-1bb7-d630-e0e1-5134570eb72c", "gridData": {"x": 16, "y": 2, "w": 8, "h": 4, "i": "1a283266-1bb7-d630-e0e1-5134570eb72c"}, "type": "lens", "embeddableConfig": {"enhancements": {"dynamicActions": {"events": []}}, "hidePanelTitles": true, "attributes": {"title": "Total Request Rate", "visualizationType": "lnsMetric", "type": "lens", "references": [], "state": {"visualization": {"layerId": "f8c2314b-088e-6167-8f5b-005b2d512d62", "layerType": "data", "metricAccessor": "3717937a-7156-d1f8-9aa6-ddef7248f4e5", "showBar": false}, "query": {"esql": "TS metrics-cassandra.otel-default
